ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pension_fund_managers" (
  "pfm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension fund manager */,
  "pfm_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the pension fund manager */,
  "pfm_name" TEXT /* Name of the pension fund manager */,
  "pfm_email" TEXT /* Email address of the pension fund manager */,
  "pfm_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the pension fund manager */,
  "pfm_address" TEXT /* Address of the pension fund manager */,
  "pfm_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the pension fund manager */,
  "pfm_description" TEXT /* Detailed description or biography of the pension fund manager */,
  "pfm_established_date" TEXT /* Date when the pension fund manager was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pfm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pension_fund_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheme performance record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "pfm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pension fund manager */,
  "scheme_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the scheme */,
  "nav" REAL /* Net Asset Value (NAV) of the scheme on the given date */,
  "scheme_type" TEXT /* Type of the pension fund scheme */,
  "scheme_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the scheme was launched */,
  "scheme_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the scheme will end (if applicable) */,
  "scheme_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pension fund scheme */,
  "scheme_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the scheme */,
  "scheme_performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the scheme */,
  "scheme_investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment */,
  "scheme_aum" REAL /* Assets under management for the scheme */,
  "scheme_fees" REAL /* Management fees and other charges associated with the scheme */,
  "scheme_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the scheme data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pension_fund_schemes_pfm_id FOREIGN KEY ("pfm_id") REFERENCES pension_fund_managers ("pfm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pension fund scheme */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "nav" REAL /* Net Asset Value (NAV) of the scheme */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns on investment for the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the scheme on the given date */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the scheme on the given date */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the scheme on the given date */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the scheme on the given date */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio of the scheme on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES pension_fund_schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
